creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
Some of the mailing list archive files exists twice, compressed and uncompressed:

ls -lagd /home/mail/archive/2000/freebsd-hubs/20001231.freebsd-hubs*
-rw-r--r--  1 wheel 1508 Jan  1  2001 /home/mail/archive/2000/freebsd-hubs/20001231.freebsd-hubs
-rw-r--r--  1 wheel   42 Dec 31  2000 /home/mail/archive/2000/freebsd-hubs/20001231.freebsd-hubs.gz


Apparently, the uncompressed file was created later. I propose to merge these 2 files into one, and compress it again.


Here is a complete list of affected files from the mailing list archive:


   2 1995/cvs-CVSROOT/19950326.cvs-CVSROOT
   2 1997/ctm-announce/19971228.ctm-announce
